headline: Anthony Gordon
body: Barcelona are very close to agreeing a £70m deal with Newcastle for Anthony Gordon. Fee could rise on instalments and various clauses. Progressing fast and possible medical later this week if talks continue to advance. Story with @mcgrathmi
text: Barcelona are very close to agreeing a £70m deal with Newcastle for Anthony Gordon. Fee could rise on instalments and various clauses. Progressing fast and possible medical later this week if talks continue to advance. Story with @mcgrathmike #nufc https://t.co/kSDyMdQSjt
